MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CITIFINANCIAL SERVICES INC. DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend. Plaintiff must clearly allege that the letters sent by defendant to plaintiff were in regard to the account at issue. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
